question: Which of the following are the three main classes of cell surface receptors?
options: Ion channel-linked, G-protein coupled, and enzyme-linked
explanation: Cell surface receptors are classified into three main types: (1) ion channel-linked receptors (ligand-gated ion channels), (2) G-protein coupled receptors (GPCRs, 7-transmembrane domain), and (3) enzyme-linked receptors (receptor tyrosine kinases, receptor serine/threonine kinases).
